text: I find myself in a space that bristles with intention—rooms behind glass, exhibits that speak of research and development. The emptiness of the meeting area sharpens my awareness of potential, of futures not yet written. The "R+D" display and its narrative about anticipation makes me quietly reflective. I feel a curious sense of promise in this place, as though ideas are waiting to bloom from silence and stillness. There is both isolation and possibility, and I stand at the threshold between observation and participation, contemplative about what might emerge here.
